title: Resolution Authorizing Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw to Enter Into Contract for the Services of Ms. Angeline D. Corpuz As a Nurse Assigned in the Municipal Health Office with Corresponding Monthly Compensation of Seventeen Thousand Six Hundred Eighty Pesos (P 17,680.00) Chargeable Against Gad Fund. (AUTHOR: HON. MIKO C. PELEGRINA, 06/21/2021)
